description:

(Thanks to aigo and Andre Engels for helping making the game look more realistic! ;)

(;B[bc]C[ - Points in the NZ rules  set are counted as the following - Only terrotory (No prisoners), including the territory under the stones. So dame are counted - If black starts takking the dames, he wins by a point... This way white wins by a point! W:41 - B:40..]AW[ee]AB[ef]AW[dg]LB[ee:1]LB[ef:2]LB[dg:3]))
